title: Anwar: Lawyers must evolve beyond ‘search engines in suits’ in AI era
description: KUALA LUMPUR: Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim called on the legal profession to undergo a fundamental shift in values, skills and knowledge to remain relevant in the era of artificial intelligence (AI) and rapid global change.
content:

title: Advocacy groups urge YouTube to protect kids from ’AI slop’ videos
description: Advocacy groups and experts condemned YouTube for serving up low-quality artificial intelligence-generated videos to its most vulnerable audience: children.
content:

title: Wipro bets big on AI, launches new unit weeks after Claude update crashed SaaS stocks
description: Indian SaaS giant Wipro has announced a dedicated artificial intelligence unit. This formation of the AI unit comes just weeks after Wipro’s stock took a hit due to the SaaSpocalypse triggered by Anthropic’s Claude Cowork.
content: Indian SaaS giant Wipro has announced that it is building a dedicated division for artificial intelligence (AI). Wipro’s AI-Native Business and Platforms unit will be working on building agentic AI solutions for entreprises. Wipro was one of the many... [2011 chars]

title: NIH funds AI project to advance Alzheimer’s research and treatment
description: The National Institutes of Health has renewed support for Artificial Intelligence for Alzheimer's Disease, or AI4AD. The new $12.6 million award to advance the project's next phase, AI4AD2, brings its total investment in AI4AD to $30.7 million.
content: The National Institutes of Health has renewed support for Artificial Intelligence for Alzheimer's Disease, or AI4AD. The new $12.6 million award to advance the project's next phase, AI4AD2, brings its total investment in AI4AD to $30.7 million. Led b... [5892 chars]

title: What's real anymore? AI warps truth of Middle East war
description: "Is Netanyahu real or AI?" an internet headline blared, pointing to a video that supposedly showed the Israeli prime minister with six fingers.But the clip was real.Speculation spiraled online that Netanyahu might be dead or wounded in an Iranian strike and that Israel was covering it up with a double generated by artificial intelligence."Last time I checked, humans usually don't have 6 fingers... AI does," said one post on X, garnering nearly five million views. "Is Netanyahu no more?"
content:
"Is Netanyahu real or AI?" an internet headline blared, pointing to a video that supposedly showed the Israeli prime minister with six fingers.
But the clip was real.

title: AI study reveals England's productivity divide is far more complex than North-South
description: Researchers at the University of Manchester have used artificial intelligence to uncover a complex picture behind England's long-running productivity puzzle, challenging the idea that the country's economic performance can be explained by a simple North-South divide. In a major study published in the Spatial Economic Analysis journal, Professor Cecilia Wong and Dr. Helen Zheng applied "GeoAI" techniques—combining geography and artificial intelligence—to analyze how productivity varies across local authorities in England between 2010 and 2022.

title: Chinese company uses AI machine to sort clothes for recycling
description: A company in eastern China is using an artificial intelligence-powered machine to sort clothes and boost recycling.
content:
ZHANGJIAGANG, China (AP) — In an industrial park in Zhangjiagang, a small city on China’s east coast, a large humming and hissing machine feeds on piles of used clothes and sorts them.

description: The CBSE had set up an expert panel to create the curriculum for artificial intelligence and computational thinking., Education, Times Now
content:

title: Ethics, academic honesty to guide AI use in Napa Valley Unified schools, board says
description: Napa Valley Unified's policy lays out ten principles in accordance with which the district supports the use of artificial intelligence. This includes ethical use, equitable access and a focus on academic honesty.
content:
As educational institutions grapple with the entry of artificial intelligence into learning spaces, Napa Valley Unified will allow its use under a policy that emphasizes ethics, equity and academic honesty.
